description: Phase 1 production app-command allow-list. Tauri v2 denies every command that is not explicitly named in `permissions`; adding a command requires touching this file, the Rust `#[tauri::command]` definition, and the TS `Commands` map in `@dayseam/ipc-types` in the same PR. Dev-only commands live in a sibling `dev.json` capability that is written by `build.rs` only when the `dev-commands` Cargo feature is enabled, so release bundles carry no dev surface at all.
